features.name: Verify Anthropic API Access
features.description: Test Claude API connectivity and validate that reliable-ai library can access Anthropic services properly

validation.test_command: python3 -c "import os; assert os.environ.get('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'), 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set'; print('OK')"

features.name: Verify Browser Agent Connectivity
features.description: Verify the Claude browser agent smoke testing service is reachable from this codespace and that CODESPACE_NAME is set.

validation.success_criteria: Browser agent service responds to health check, CODESPACE_NAME is set
